symptom: Model picker could scroll but model cards could not be selected.
rootCause: Nested interactive controls and pointer capture before drag threshold.
v3Prevention: No nested buttons inside selectable cards; pointer capture only after movement threshold.
requiredTest: Model card remains clickable after scroll and drag.

symptom: PWA registration crashed with undefined waiting property.
v3Prevention: Guarded opt-in service worker registration; no automatic unsafe access.
requiredTest: No console/page error during app startup.

symptom: Local GPT Image 2 panel loaded empty model selectors and disabled start buttons.
rootCause: Client script error and brittle model options loading.
v3Prevention: Test Client SDK handles empty model lists with fallback and visible recoverable error.
requiredTest: Panel renders model cards or an actionable fallback state.

symptom: One relay 502 or slow model aborted the whole multi-model test.
rootCause: Per-model failure was not isolated from run-level completion.
v3Prevention: Model-level timeout/failure isolation; complete if at least one selected model succeeds.
requiredTest: One failing model is logged and skipped while successful models complete.

symptom: Feedback stored only in local browser memory cannot train server-side optimization.
rootCause: localStorage used as primary learning state.
v3Prevention: Server-first feedback storage with local cache and idempotent offline sync.
requiredTest: Feedback is persisted server-side and local duplicate sync is idempotent.
